trigger.description: respondMode is set to service_tag but the local tailscale daemon does not advertise tag:ee-mesh. Peers will see decline responses on every hello attempt; the local host is effectively undiscoverable by other ee instances on the tailnet.
setup_commands: EE_MESH_ENABLED=1 ee status --workspace . --json   # check that selfAdvertisedTags does NOT include tag:ee-mesh
